description: Project Steward lifecycle hooks for Claude Code. Primary command requires the CLI on PATH (pipx install project-steward); the || fallback runs the bundled zero-install shim on POSIX shells. On native Windows, install the CLI — the fallback's ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} expansion is POSIX-only.

hooks.command: project-steward hook session-start --agent claude || python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/project_steward_hook.py" session-start --agent claude
project-steward hook post-tool-use --agent claude || python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/project_steward_hook.py" post-tool-use --agent claude
project-steward hook user-prompt-submit --agent claude || python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/project_steward_hook.py" user-prompt-submit --agent claude
project-steward hook stop --agent claude || python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/project_steward_hook.py" stop --agent claude
project-steward hook pre-compact --agent claude || python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/project_steward_hook.py" pre-compact --agent claude
project-steward hook session-end --agent claude || python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/project_steward_hook.py" session-end --agent claude
